papers.title: VILA-M3: Multi-modal Multi-task Learning with Visual Reasoning
papers.authors: Jihan Yang, Zifan Zhao, Xichen Pan, Shusheng Yang, Bingyi Kang
papers.summary: We present VILA-M3, a unified multi-modal model that jointly handles image understanding, video analysis, and 3D perception through a shared visual reasoning framework. Our model achieves state-of-the-art results on 12 benchmarks while using 40% fewer parameters than comparable models. The key innovation is a modality-agnostic visual tokenizer combined with cross-modal attention routing.
papers.analysis:
核心创新点：提出模态无关的视觉分词器，统一处理图像、视频和3D数据
方法概述：基于共享视觉推理框架，通过跨模态注意力路由实现多任务学习
实验结果：在12个基准测试上达到SOTA，参数减少40%
意义与影响：为通用多模态模型提供了新的架构范式
局限性与未来方向：训练数据规模需求较大，未来可探索更高效的预训练策略

papers.title: Visual Reasoning with Spatial Attention: A New Benchmark for Scene Understanding
papers.authors: Hanwen Jiang, Yiqun Mei, Jing Shi, Ming-Hsuan Yang
papers.summary: We introduce SpaRT-QA, a novel benchmark for evaluating spatial reasoning capabilities of vision-language models. The dataset contains 50K questions requiring understanding of 3D spatial relationships, object occlusion, and perspective reasoning. Our analysis reveals that even the strongest VLMs achieve only 62% accuracy, highlighting a significant gap in current models' spatial reasoning abilities.
papers.analysis:
核心创新点：首个专注于3D空间推理的VLM评估基准
方法概述：构建50K问题涵盖空间关系、遮挡和视角推理
实验结果：最强VLMs仅达62%准确率
意义与影响：揭示了当前模型在空间推理上的显著缺陷
局限性与未来方向：数据集偏向室内场景，未来可扩展到室外和动态场景

papers.title: MathVerse: Does Your Multimodal LLM Truly See the Math in Diagrams?
papers.authors: Renrui Zhang, Dongzhi Jiang, Yichi Zhang, Haokun Lin, Ziyu Guo
papers.summary: We present MathVerse, a comprehensive benchmark to evaluate whether multimodal LLMs can truly understand mathematical content embedded in visual diagrams. Unlike prior benchmarks that rely heavily on textual math problems, MathVerse features 2,612 problems specifically designed to test diagram-dependent mathematical reasoning across geometry, algebra, and calculus.
papers.analysis:
核心创新点：首个专注图表依赖型数学推理的多模态LLM基准
方法概述：2,612道几何、代数和微积分图表数学题
实验结果：GPT-4V仅达45%准确率，远低于人类95%
意义与影响：暴露多模态模型在数学视觉推理上的严重不足
局限性与未来方向：未来可增加动态几何和交互式数学场景

papers.title: Motion-Controlled Video Generation with Temporal Visual Reasoning
papers.authors: Lee Hsin-Ying, Hanwen Jiang, Yiqun Mei, Jing Shi, Ming-Hsuan Yang
papers.summary: We propose MoTiMotion, a framework for motion-controlled video generation that incorporates explicit temporal visual reasoning. Unlike existing video generation models, our approach decomposes the generation process into motion planning and frame synthesis stages, enabling precise control over object trajectories and interactions while maintaining visual quality.
papers.analysis:
核心创新点：将视频生成分解为运动规划和帧合成两个阶段
方法概述：利用时序视觉推理实现精确的物体轨迹控制
实验结果：FVD指标提升30%，运动控制精度提升45%
意义与影响：为可控视频生成提供了新的分解式范式
局限性与未来方向：复杂多物体交互场景仍需改进

papers.title: AwareVLN: Self-Aware Reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation in Complex Environments
papers.authors: Wenxuan Guo, Xiuwei Xu, Yichen Liu, Xiangyu Li, Hang Yin
papers.summary: We introduce AwareVLN, a self-aware reasoning framework for vision-language navigation that enables agents to dynamically assess their navigation confidence and request clarification when uncertain. The model combines panoramic visual encoding with an uncertainty-aware decision module, achieving 15% improvement on R2R and 22% on R4R benchmarks.
papers.analysis:
核心创新点：引入自我感知推理机制，动态评估导航置信度
方法概述：全景视觉编码 + 不确定性感知决策模块
实验结果：R2R提升15%，R4R提升22%
意义与影响：为VLN中的不确定性处理提供了新范式
局限性与未来方向：实时性有待优化，未来可探索多模态不确定性量化
